title: How to get a police certificate – Libya - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Libya
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of document you need
Certificate of Innocence (“Chahadet Baraa” in Arabic)

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
We’ll let you know if you need to provide a Libyan police certificate when you apply for
- some temporary residence programs
See the document checklist or the visa office’s requirements for details.
Apply in person at your local police station.
Certificates aren’t available for former residents. If you no longer live in Libya, you don’t need to provide a Libyan police certificate. If you’re asked for a police certificate from Libya, write, “I cannot provide a police certificate for the time I spent in Libya because certificates are not available to former residents.”

## Documents you’ll need
- Passport-sized photographs (2)
- Proof of residency/identification for non-citizens
